title: 1200W Ceramic Plug in Fan Heater, Portable Electric Heaters with 2 Heat Modes, Anti-Dumping, Anti-Overheating, Safe and Environmentally Friendly,for Bedroom,Living Room,Office (Blue)
features: SAFETY and PROTECTION - Deyaah ceramic space heater is made of advanced PTC ceramic heating technology, upgraded abs flame retardant material, 45 ° dumping protection, turning off the space heater when overturning (only when standing stably can it output heat for you), insulating shell, and enhanced safety plug. It heats up day and night, avoiding any fire hazard, and protecting the safety of your family.

ENERGH SAVING and HIGH EFFICIENCY - This is a very energy-saving space heater for indoor use. The 1200W portable space heater has two different heating settings (low and high), three second heating, constant temperature output, and more uniform heat distribution. You don't have to waste a lot of money on central heating.

SILENCE and OCCASION - The noise emitted by Deyaah portable heaters for indoor use is less than 30 decibels. The purpose of this portable heater is to place your feet on the floor, put your hands close to the table, or carry it indoors quietly enough for most people to use when sleeping in the bedroom. The cold winter will not affect your work and life at all, and you can sleep or work at ease.

COMFORTABLE - It is a very comfortable space heater. The space heater heats more efficiently with a working power of up to 1200W, smoothes airflow, eliminates air turbulence, provides soft and quiet warmth, and is easy to carry and move. It is very suitable for houses with children and pets.

EXQUISITE APPEARANCE - 8.2 "* 5.9" * 5.5 "personal heater adopts compact shape design, which is very suitable for use in various places. The high temperature resistant air outlet prevents your hands from burning. Clear work indicator light can keep you informed of the working state of the heater at any time. The hidden handle can be easily lifted and placed anywhere. It is easy to carry and move. Our design has three colors (white/blue/green) 。 Let your winter refuse the cold.

ATTENTION - The Deyaah Oscillating Space heater is equipped with an anti vibration protective cover during transportation. When receiving the product, be sure to remove the protective cover, otherwise it may cause the product to trigger (overheating protection).If the product turns or tilts, The space heater will automatically turn off the power, straighten and restart.
